channel.title: Stephanie A. Foré on DICE Lab: Diversity In Changing Environments
channel.description: Recent content in Stephanie A. Foré on DICE Lab: Diversity In Changing Environments

item.title: A quantitative comparison of two sample methods for collecting Amblyomma americanum and Dermacentor variabilis (Acari: Ixodidae) in Missouri
item.description: Abstract In studies of tick communities, sampling methodology may influence observed patterns.
